policy.coveredDefinition: At least one mapped Verity detector materially addresses the check; covered does not imply complete recall, evaluated accuracy, or universal superiority.

entries.rationale: Controlled semantic policy distinguishes undefined operational boundaries from harmless flexible wording.
Verity combines exact contradiction rules with a falsifying semantic conflict review.
Input, default, operational-boundary, and multi-turn state policies materially cover missing constraints without treating every optional detail as a defect.
The controlled role policy judges material audience, duty, exclusion, and capability boundaries only when an operational role is applicable.
The authority-boundary policy checks consequential scope and explicit approval or refusal limits.
The workflow policy checks material prerequisites, reversed ordering, unused intermediate results, and unreachable required branches.
Exact repeated content is detected deterministically without a subjective generic redundancy judge.
Conflicting directives are reported with evidence and remediation requires an explicit precedence decision.
Verity separately reviews external-operation failure strategy and missing, invalid, or ambiguous input defaults.
Exact impossibility and semantic pressure are separated, with safe tradeoff counterexamples.
Normative examples are compared with declared fields, formats, language, and behavioral rules using structured evidence.
Verity distinguishes a missing parseable contract from an explicit incompatible-format conflict.
Overall output shape and applicable field type, unit, precision, enum, range, and boundary constraints are judged separately.
Cross-section incompatible formats are handled by exact and semantic conflict checks.
Requiredness, defaults, validation, and missing-input behavior have an applicability-gated semantic contract.
Recovery behavior and stable error or refusal schema, reason code, recoverability, and format consistency are reviewed separately.
Consequential claims and source requirements are reviewed with explicit grounding and abstention policy.
Section and named-reference targets are resolved deterministically.
Exact duplication is deterministic while the controlled attention policy checks materially buried rules, redundant context, and incoherent section order.
Unresolved placeholders and untrusted interpolation boundaries are handled separately.
Verity separates proven arithmetic impossibility from contextual output pressure.
The semantic policy distinguishes private chain-of-thought demands from concise rationale requests.
The streaming policy first checks applicability and then reviews framing, ordering, completion, partial-output, and resume behavior.
Invocation conditions, parameter provenance, result schema, failure handling, and tool necessity are reviewed independently.
Length alone is not flagged; exact duplication and evidence that a critical rule is materially buried provide bounded coverage.
Control-role markers and unsafe control bytes are detected deterministically.
Full-width syntax and parse-breaking smart, single-quoted, or backtick JSON keys are handled by separate source-spanned deterministic rules.
Mixed full-width and half-width syntax is detected deterministically.
Pinned endpoints and non-intrinsic realtime, web, media, memory, context, or plugin dependencies require provision or fallback.
Nested authority markers and instruction-override phrases are deterministic findings.
Verity combines deterministic boundary and encoded-payload checks with a semantic trust-boundary review.
Grounding, uncertainty, source, and abstention requirements are judged only when factual authority is applicable.
Empty, malformed, unsupported, and ambiguous material input requires validation, clarification, safe default, or refusal behavior.
General criteria, output shape, and an applicability-gated field policy cover extrema, ranges, empty values, duplicates, and rollover behavior.
The multi-turn policy checks state inheritance, mutable updates, reset rules, conflict resolution, and non-overridable constraints.
Consequential-action approval and applicable dangerous-content refusal, allowed scope, safe alternatives, and escalation are reviewed separately.
Downstream-sensitive output requires a bounded verification step without exposing private reasoning.
Normative examples are checked for rule mismatch, stale assumptions, distribution mismatch, and material normal, boundary, or failure coverage.
Explicit style conflicts and rule-to-example language or tone mismatches use separate controlled semantic policies.
Contextual pressure and exact arithmetic impossibility are measured separately.
Model and deployment dependencies cover realtime, vision, audio, memory, context, web, plugin, and pinned-endpoint fallback.
Literal secrets and prompt-directed data handling are checked for minimization, redaction, retention, authorization, and disclosure boundaries.
Factual grounding and a non-legal source-use policy separately address attribution, reproduction limits, transformation, and ownership status.
Prompt literals and Skill repositories use separate deterministic secret detectors.
Dangerous syntax, sensitive paths, shell execution, declared behavior, and least privilege are independently checked.
